acceptance_criteria.criterion: Archive-readiness surfaces include actionable follow-up or disposition signals derived from review evidence, not only artifact-presence summaries.
acceptance_criteria.evidence: Delivered by pi-step-ceremony-and-artifact-enforcement (commit e4adef5): archiveCeremonySurface and rowBlockers taxonomy provide disposition signals.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Any new archive or review evidence surfaced to Pi is rendered by the existing adapter without re-deriving backend semantics.
acceptance_criteria.evidence: Superseding row preserved thin-adapter discipline; Pi adapter consumes backend JSON without re-deriving semantics.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Validation covers backend commands and at least one headless Pi /work flow against pi-adapter-foundation in this session.
acceptance_criteria.evidence: Validation performed in superseding row's delivery (commit e4adef5).
